The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Robbie Moore

I'm Robbie Moore, your Member of Parliament for Keighley and Ilkley. I'm working hard to stand up for our community and deliver the change we all want to see. Here, you can find my latest news, campaign videos and more about me. If you've got an issue of concern, please do not hesitate to get in touch.

Contact Robbie Moore

Office of Robbie Moore MP
Shan House, 80-86 North St, Keighley, BD21 3AG
01535 600538
[email protected]
When writing to me by letter or email please always include your full name and home address including postcode.
Please be aware I receive a large volume of correspondence, but will endeavour to respond as quickly as possible.
